Why choose Hierance?

Precision AI matching, verified talent pools, and seamless discovery — built to bridge ambition with innovation.

1,200+ verified premium roles

JobsCompaniesServicesPrices

About Hierance

At Hierance, we bridge ambition with innovation. By combining precision AI matching with seamless discovery, we empower job seekers to land roles where they thrive and enable employers to build the future with absolute confidence.

Contact Info
support@hierance.com
Bangalore, India & SF, CA
Open Contact Form
World-Class Services

Intelligent hiring, redefined.

We combine advanced AI with human expertise to create the most seamless recruitment experience — for employers building world-class teams and professionals seeking roles where they truly belong.

What We Offer

Services built for modern hiring

60% faster hiring

AI-Powered Matching

Our proprietary algorithms analyze skills, experience depth, and culture fit to surface the top 3% of candidates for every role — reducing time-to-hire by 60%.

95% relevance rate

Smart Job Discovery

Candidates receive hyper-personalized job recommendations based on career trajectory, salary expectations, and growth potential — not just keyword matches.

100% verified

Verified Talent Profiles

Every professional on Hierance undergoes credential verification, skills assessment, and reference validation before appearing in recruiter search results.

Live dashboards

Analytics & Insights

Real-time dashboards for recruiters showing pipeline health, conversion rates, time-to-fill benchmarks, and diversity hiring metrics across all active roles.

White-glove service

Dedicated Recruitment

Enterprise clients receive a dedicated success manager who architects custom hiring strategies, manages candidate outreach, and optimizes every pipeline stage.

1-click apply

Instant Application

One-click apply with AI-optimized resumes. Our system auto-tailors cover letters and highlights relevant experience for each specific job posting.

The Process

How Hierance works

STEP 01

Profile Creation

Build your verified professional profile with AI-assisted skill mapping and career timeline visualization.

STEP 02

Intelligent Matching

Our AI engine cross-references your profile against thousands of opportunities, scoring each for fit and growth potential.

STEP 03

Curated Shortlists

Receive hand-picked opportunities ranked by match quality, or let recruiters discover you through our verified talent marketplace.

STEP 04

Seamless Hiring

From interview scheduling to offer negotiation, our platform streamlines every step — so you can focus on finding the right fit.

12k+Active Professionals
850+Partner Companies
96%Satisfaction Rate
4.2 daysAvg. Time to Match
Tailored Solutions

Built for everyone

Scale your team with confidence

From sourcing to onboarding, our platform handles the heavy lifting so your team can focus on building. Access verified talent, automate repetitive tasks, and gain visibility into every metric that matters.

Employer features
  • Custom career page branded to your company
  • ATS integration with 30+ platforms
  • AI-powered candidate ranking and scoring
  • Automated interview scheduling
  • Real-time analytics and hiring insights
  • Dedicated recruitment success manager
Trusted by Thousands
